summary: Completed testing of Driver Leaderboard feature. Backend: 15/15 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI elements and flows verified working. Delivery driver sees leaderboard with monthly rankings, rewards for top 3, and current position. Admin can configure leaderboard rewards (1st, 2nd, 3rd place). Customer correctly denied access to leaderboard.

issues: Hydration warning in console for select/option elements (cosmetic, not visible to users)

passed_tests: ✅ Backend: Delivery user can access leaderboard (200 OK)
✅ Backend: Leaderboard returns correct structure (leaderboard, my_position, rewards, month_info, total_participants)
✅ Backend: Leaderboard entries have required fields (driver_id, name, orders_count, avg_rating, earnings, rank)
✅ Backend: my_position includes rank, data, is_in_top_10
✅ Backend: Rewards structure has first, second, third with correct values
✅ Backend: Month info includes name, year, days_remaining
✅ Backend: Top 3 drivers have rewards and badges (🥇🥈🥉), others have 0
✅ Backend: Customer cannot access leaderboard (403 Forbidden)
✅ Backend: Unauthenticated cannot access leaderboard (401)
✅ Backend: Admin can get delivery settings including leaderboard_rewards
✅ Backend: Admin can update leaderboard rewards (200 OK)
✅ Backend: Admin rejects negative rewards (400)
✅ Backend: Delivery user cannot update rewards (403)
✅ Backend: Customer cannot update rewards (403)
✅ Backend: Leaderboard uses configured rewards from settings
✅ Frontend: Delivery driver login navigates to /delivery/dashboard
✅ Frontend: Leaderboard card visible with data-testid='leaderboard-toggle'
✅ Frontend: Leaderboard header 'لوحة الصدارة' visible
✅ Frontend: Month info and participants count visible
✅ Frontend: Leaderboard expands on click showing rewards section
✅ Frontend: Rewards section 'جوائز نهاية الشهر' displays 🥇🥈🥉 with amounts
✅ Frontend: Days remaining text visible
✅ Frontend: Current driver rank badge (#1) visible
✅ Frontend: Customer NOT shown leaderboard (correct behavior)
✅ Frontend: Admin can access 'إعدادات التوصيل' tab
✅ Frontend: Admin sees 'جوائز لوحة الصدارة' section
✅ Frontend: Admin can modify reward values for 1st, 2nd, 3rd place
✅ Frontend: 'حفظ جوائز الصدارة' save button visible and functional
✅ Frontend: Total rewards display updates dynamically
critical_code_review_comments: DriverLeaderboard.js correctly uses data-testid='leaderboard-toggle' for testing
DeliverySettingsTab.js correctly fetches and saves leaderboard_rewards
Backend /api/delivery/leaderboard correctly restricts access to delivery users only
Backend /api/settings/leaderboard-rewards correctly restricts updates to admin only
Rewards structure correctly defaults to 50000/30000/15000 SYP
Top 3 drivers correctly assigned rewards and badges (🥇🥈🥉)
All API calls use process.env.REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL correctly

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All UI elements display and function correctly

seed_data_creation: Delivery driver 'فهد المندوب' exists with 2 orders this month, ranked #1 in leaderboard
context_for_next_testing_agent: Driver Leaderboard feature fully tested and working. Leaderboard shows top 10 drivers monthly with rewards for top 3 (default: 1st=50000, 2nd=30000, 3rd=15000 SYP). Admin can configure rewards in DeliverySettingsTab. Customer correctly denied access. API tests in /app/backend/tests/test_driver_leaderboard.py

list: Payment gateway (Sham Cash) - accepts any 6-digit OTP

rewards_section.description: حدد الجوائز الشهرية للمراكز الثلاثة الأولى
